name: Underground Lab
summary: Elias's hidden bunker where Molly is raised in secret. Cramped, warm, hand-repaired — the irreplaceable broken things that are the Accord's opposite.

rooms.name: Main Laboratory
rooms.lighting: Single hanging bulb, warm amber pool of light fading into deep shadow; filtered daylight from a grimy skylight.
rooms.sounds: Low hum of old servers, intermittent drip, the three-note lullaby playing faintly from a speaker.
rooms.ambient: Lived-in, secret, protective. The heart of the bunker.
rooms.furniture: Scarred steel workbench, mismatched salvaged chairs, racks of repaired electronics, a cot in the corner.
rooms.map: Long rectangular room; workbench along the right wall, server racks at the back, skylight above center, blast door to the left.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. An underground laboratory bunker: scarred steel workbench cluttered with hand-repaired electronics and tools, racks of humming salvaged servers, a single warm hanging bulb, a grimy skylight leaking pale daylight, concrete walls with exposed conduit.

rooms.name: Molly's Quarters
rooms.lighting: Soft, dim, intimate — a string of low warm LEDs and one reading lamp.
rooms.sounds: Muffled hum through the wall, the faint lullaby, the creak of the cot.
rooms.ambient: Private, adolescent, a little restless — a kept child's world.
rooms.furniture: Narrow cot, a shelf of salvaged books and trinkets, a cracked mirror, the tarnished silver locket on a nail.
rooms.map: Small alcove off the main lab; cot against the back wall, shelf to the right, curtain for a door.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A cramped private sleeping alcove in an underground bunker: a narrow cot with worn blankets, a shelf of salvaged books and small trinkets, a cracked mirror, a string of dim warm LEDs, a curtained doorway, concrete walls.

rooms.name: The Hidden Archive
rooms.lighting: Cold blue glow of a single active terminal in the dark; everything else black.
rooms.sounds: Cooling fans, the click of a keyboard, oppressive silence.
rooms.ambient: Forbidden, tense — where Molly finds the truth.
rooms.furniture: A locked server cabinet, one terminal and chair, sealed crates of records.
rooms.map: Concealed room behind the server racks; terminal facing the door, locked cabinet on the far wall.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A hidden archive room behind a concealed door in an underground bunker: a locked server cabinet, a single glowing terminal screen casting cold blue light in the dark, sealed crates of old records, heavy shadows.

rooms.name: Repair Bay
rooms.lighting: Harsh white work-lamp clamped to a vise, sparks, the rest in gloom.
rooms.sounds: Whir of a hand drill, clink of tools, hiss of a soldering iron.
rooms.ambient: Industrious, greasy, where things get fixed.
rooms.furniture: Pegboard of tools, a vise-mounted bench, half-dismantled machines, oil drums.
rooms.map: Side bay off the main lab; bench under the work-lamp, tool wall to the left, parts bins below.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A cluttered repair bay in an underground bunker: a pegboard wall of tools, a vise-mounted workbench under a harsh white clamp lamp, half-dismantled machines and salvaged parts, oil drums, grease-stained concrete floor.

rooms.name: The Skylight Nook
rooms.lighting: A single shaft of pale grey daylight from a grimy skylight; dust motes.
rooms.sounds: Wind over the surface above, distant and lonely.
rooms.ambient: Wistful, yearning — Molly's one window to the sky she can't reach.
rooms.furniture: A cushioned crate to sit on, a telescope aimed at the skylight, scattered drawings.
rooms.map: Tall narrow shaft at the lab's center; seat directly under the skylight, drawings pinned around.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A quiet nook beneath a tall grimy skylight in an underground bunker: a single shaft of pale daylight cutting through dust motes, a cushioned crate seat, a small telescope aimed upward, children's drawings pinned to concrete.
